productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Ultimatum Max Grey Backpack
description: CompositionTalk about style and space rolled into one, and there's no better Sports bag you can find than this one from nike. Neatly designed with lots of organizer space, this bag makes for a great everyday wear to college or work.Height:20"Width: 17"Depth: 6.7"Capacity: 33 L Made of nylon and polyester with a nylon lining for durability and easy cleaning Branded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bag Ventilated shoe compartment on the base that has a tarpaulin bottom One main copiously spaced zippered compartment with laptop sleeve Protected media pocket with zippered closure One front zippered compartment that comes with organizers and pouches for easy use Ballistic nylon facade with swoosh panel appliqued on it Insert pocket with plastic hook, cooler compartment and zippered pocket on the front with tape detailing Mesh pockets on the sides for carrying sipper Synthetic haul loop for handling ease nike Max Air Curve shoulder straps and ventilated compression molded back panel for carrying ease, better air flow, comfort and to protect the shoulders and back from injuries Stabilizing hip support on the sides for extra comfort WashCareHand washClean with a damp cloth when necessaryDo not dry clean or machine washDo not bleachDo not tumble dryDo not wringLine dryDo not iron
